chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 4240 of 2017 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Hearing 1. For order on Misc. No.592/2022 2. For order on office objection 3. For hearing of main case 06-05-2025 Mr. Muhammad Imran, advocate holds brief for Mr. Munsif Jan, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Messrs. M. Tufail, DSP Legal TRO and Sarfaraz-ud-Din, DSP Gulshan-e-Iqbal T/D Central. This petition is pending since 2017 without any progress. Diaries demonstrate that petitioner’s counsel has not appeared since 2022 and even today brief is being held and adjournment is being sought. Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
